message:
feat(status,scanner): add memory/swap diagnostics and expand artifact detection patterns

Status command enhancements:
- Display RAM and swap usage in human-readable format with percentages
- Detect swap thrash-risk condition (>70% swap used while >8GB RAM free)
  which indicates the host experienced memory pressure and is slowly
  paging back in — useful for diagnosing agent fleet performance issues
- Include memory info in JSON output mode for machine consumption
- Add unit tests for bytes_to_pct edge cases and thrash-risk detection

Scanner pattern additions from real-world agent workspace observations:
- Detect *-target directories as Rust build artifacts (e.g. work-target)
- Detect frankenterm-* and *-ft directories as agent workspace artifacts
- Detect cargo-home-* and .cargo_* directories as temp/cache artifacts
- Add extract_pattern_label() entries for consistent grouping in reports
- Add test covering classification of observed real-world directory names

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
